rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"BinaryFieldLib","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Arithmetic over the canonical Binius tower of binary fields.   Tower construction (matches binius64 crate):     T_0 = GF(2)     T_{k+1} = T_k[\u03b2_k] / (\u03b2_k\u00b2 + \u03b2_{k-1}\u00b7\u03b2_k + 1)   At each level, an element of T_{k+1} is (hi, lo) where hi, lo \u2208 T_k.   Packed into a uint256 with lo in the lower bits.   Key operations at each level:     mulAlpha_k: multiply by the level-k generator \u03b2_k.       mulAlpha_0(x) = x  (identity on GF(2))       mulAlpha_k(a0, a1) = (a1, a0 \u2295 mulAlpha_{k-1}(a1))     multiply: Karatsuba with the reduction \u03b2_k\u00b2 = \u03b2_{k-1}\u00b7\u03b2_k + 1:       lo = p0 \u2295 p1       hi = (pm \u2295 p0 \u2295 p1) \u2295 mulAlpha_{k-1}(p1)     square:       lo = sq(a0) \u2295 sq(a1)       hi = mulAlpha_{k-1}(sq(a1))","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/BinaryFieldLib.sol":"BinaryFieldLib"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":10000},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/BinaryFieldLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0x357b9a1e25083685c2bc358ea577fa47c1db162d61e9ce452aece99916844466","license":"Apache-2.0 OR MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ecd6dd3e0bd9521c4c178fbed7b9156c2d193a4e963b54d710d9ac1ea431c011","dweb:/ipfs/QmcLydmRLakKumDqQPtXsuGCe3Go7P1PJ3sBwJzzyCU7sr"]}},"version":1}
